definition:
1. to wound , (Homer):—;Pass., τετρῶσθαι τὸν μηρόν to have a wound  in the thigh, (Herdotus Historicus): —;with accusative cognate, τιτρώσκειν φόνον to inflict  a death wound , (Euripides) 
2. generally, to damage, cripple , of ships, (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. metaphorically, of wine, to do  one a mischief , (Euripides) (ML)
